rationale: The citing paper explicitly frames its contribution as extending prior metacognitive/processing-fluency research and testing boundary conditions for fluency effects on evaluation. The cited paper is a processing-fluency mechanism paper (“goal fluency” affecting brand evaluation), making it a plausible theory/mechanism source rather than an obviously incidental mention. Even though the raw evidence is only a single DOI match with no local citation context, there is enough topical-theoretical alignment to warrant second-stage judgment.
